content.en:
"Endless Lord, I won't go to this circle, you can go in. "

The Lord of the Word said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately walked into this magic circle and came to the magic circle void.

Buzzing!!!

The altar of sacrifice appeared in the void of the magic circle, and it was only necessary to put the treasures of time and space into the altar to evolve a scene of time and space fusion for people to understand.

Wow!

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, and a large number of space-time treasures were put into it.

Soon, the sacrificial altar released an infinite amount of light, instantly devouring these space-time treasures.

"I can't even sense where these space-time treasures have gone?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He even marked some space-time treasures, but they were erased in an instant, as if these treasures had gone to an unknown place and disappeared directly

Mysterious!

This circle was too mysterious for him to comprehend.

Immediately, he still honestly used this magic circle to comprehend the fusion of time and space.

Bang!!!

The void of the magic circle was distorted, and the power of time and space emerged, and then it was presented in a special way, and then 08 fused together, turning into the power of time and space.

This circle is a fusion of time and space in various ways, suitable for any peak Legendary Realm Lord.

And Ye Tian sat here cross-legged, silently contemplating, and gradually immersed in the fusion of time and space.

He was fascinated, and gradually gained a lot of insights into the fusion of time and space.

Moreover, he has a Legendary-level Time Ancestor and a Legendary-level Space Ancestor, and his understanding of time and space is naturally far superior to other peak Legendary Realm Lords, so the perception he has gained at this moment is far beyond that of other Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Time passed slowly, but I don't know if a period of time had passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian realized the mystery of space-time fusion, and the time and space under his control began to merge.

After a while, an incomparably powerful force appeared.

Time and space control!

At the moment when this force appeared, the power of time and space seemed to be one level lower, and it was above any other power.

Ye Tian incorporated the power of space-time control into his body, making his body more powerful, and the power of legend in his body was gradually transformed into space-time control power.

However, his attainments in space-time fusion are not high, and he is only a preliminary fusion, so only a little bit of legendary power in his body has been transformed into space-time control power, strictly speaking, he is not yet a second-level peak legendary realm lord.

Subsequently.

Ye Tianyan continued to comprehend, and when his space-time fusion attainment improved a little, he continued to fuse the amount of space-time.

Before I knew it, a hundred eternal years had passed.

For the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, a hundred eternal years was really short, but this comprehension benefited Ye Tian a lot, and his attainments in the fusion of time and space were greatly improved.

"There are too many insights this time, and it's too late to transform into strength, so when the time comes to this time, let's go out. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The space-time treasures he took out to sacrifice were enough to sustain more than a hundred eternal years.

Soon, more than a dozen eternal years passed.

Airplanes!!!!

The circle stopped, indicating that the time was up.

Immediately, Ye Tian left here.

When he left the circle, he sensed the Lord of the Word and found that the Lord of the Word was no longer here.

"Maybe it's in the circle, or maybe it's out for a while. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's other replica bodies were comprehending and digesting the harvest this time, but this replica body entered the misty corridor.

He was still quite curious about the Misty Corridor.

Even the Peak Legendary Realm Lord can be trapped, and there hasn't been a Peak Legendary Realm Lord so far.

What a mysterious place!

The gap in the strength of the peak legendary realm lord is also very large, for example, the peak legendary realm lord of the fifth level, I am afraid that he will not be able to break away from the peak legendary realm lord.

Ye Tian didn't think that he would be able to get out of the misty corridor, but he didn't care about this replica body, anyway, it didn't cost much to recondense a replica body.

Wow!

Ye Tian directly entered the misty corridor and disappeared in an instant.

......

Corridor of the Mist.

Ye Tian appeared in a misty area, in fact, it was not really a fog, but his perception was blocked, and everything in the outside world was in a special state, so he looked at the surroundings as a fog.

This is a special state of fog, and even as a peak Legendary Realm Lord, he can't see it clearly.

At this time.

Ye Tian's induction with the other clones still exists, but it is only an induction, and it can't break the barrier.

Moreover, he could not see the entrance to the mountain crevice, and everything around him seemed to be foggy.

Wow!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, shuttling at an extremely fast speed, and even used the top-notch supreme technique Eternal Light, shuttling through the void in the form of Eternal Light, but after shuttling for a long time, he still did not fly to the end, as if there was no end here.

Moreover, he did not perceive the existence of other peak Legendary Realm Lords.

"Gather a replica body and try flying from different directions. "

Ye Tian quickly condensed a replica body, and both replica bodies were here.

Rushing!!

After the two replica bodies separated, they soon could not merge, as if the two replicated bodies were in different time and space, and they could not meet each other at all, and the connection between the two replicated bodies was no different from the outside world.

Immediately, Ye Tian gave up and left the misty corridor.

He walked slowly through the Misty Corridor and comprehended the rules here, and he found that he was fighting against the Misty Corridor, trying to analyze and perceive the state of the mist here in 170, which helped to hone his perception and understanding of time and space.

Time passed slowly, and the two replica bodies kept walking aimlessly, without any goal.

Gradually, Ye Tian's state of mind also calmed down.

Suddenly, one day.

After Ye Tian's replica body walked, he saw a vision.

"Vision!"

He had heard the Lord of the Stygian say before that there were organic fates in the Mist Corridor, such as a kind of vision, each vision represented a different chance, and there was no rule, and whether or not he could encounter the vision was a matter of chance.

If you're unlucky and you can't see a vision, that's normal.

But now, Ye Tian's luck is not bad, and he saw a vision.

Rumble!!!!

A creature wrapped in thunder and lightning roared in the void, and the next moment it was crushed by a hand.

This scene has been repeated in this area.

"Battle Vision!"

Ye Tian was puzzled, could it be that this was a projection vision of the real battle picture?

The creature presented in the vision was terrifying, and the thunder and lightning aura seemed to surpass the thunder path in his cognition, and each thunder and lightning aura seemed to be able to hit hard, and it was to bombard the weaker peak Legendary Realm Lord.

However, the big hand of terror was even more terrifying, and it pinched the creature with one hand. _
